name: get_kernels
short_description: Get kernel definitions in a Xilinx object file
full_help:
get_kernels

Description: 
Get kernel definitions in a Xilinx object file

Syntax: 
get_kernels  -xo_path <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
List of kernel definitions

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -xo_path    Absolute path to the Xilinx object file
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
SDAccel, Kernel

arguments.description: Absolute path to the Xilinx object file
Suspend message limits during command execution
